info.description:
A self-contained YouTube Music player backend that authenticates via browser cookies,
resolves audio streams through the Innertube internal API, and plays audio locally.
Designed as a modular music player daemon for TUIs, Raycast extensions, and other clients.
info.title: YouTube Music API

get.description: Returns album information including all tracks.
Returns artist information including top tracks and albums.

post.description:
Submit your browser Cookie header string to create an authenticated session.
Copy it from a POST request to music.youtube.com in browser DevTools (Network tab).

delete.description: Removes the current session, requiring re-authentication.

get.description:
Returns whether the current session is valid and the associated account.
If pre-seeded cookies are configured and request is from localhost, returns token without auth.
Searches LrcLib for lyrics by track name and artist. Returns synced lyrics if available, otherwise plain lyrics.

post.description: Advances to the next track in the queue. Returns the new player state.
Pauses the current track if playing, or resumes if paused.

Resolves the audio stream for a YouTube Music video ID and begins playback.
If the track is not already in the queue, it is added at the current position.
Goes back to the previous track in the queue. Returns the new player state.
Sets repeat mode: "off", "all", "one", or "cycle" (cycles to next mode).
Toggles shuffle mode on or off. When enabled, queue is shuffled.

get.description: Returns the current playback state including current track, pause status, and queue info.

post.description: Stops the current track and clears the playing state. Queue is preserved.

get.description: Returns all playlists from the authenticated user's YouTube Music library.
Returns the metadata and full track listing for a playlist by ID.

post.description: Queues all tracks from the playlist for background caching via yt-dlp.
Loads all tracks from the playlist into the queue and begins playback from the first track.

get.description: Returns the full playback queue with track details and current position.

delete.description: Removes all tracks from the queue. Stops playback if active.

post.description: Adds a track to the end of the playback queue by video ID.
Inserts a track to play immediately after the current track.

delete.description: Removes the track at the specified position (0-indexed) from the queue.

get.description:
Searches YouTube Music for songs, albums, artists, or playlists.
Use the filter parameter to narrow results to a specific type.

parameters.description: Filter type: songs, albums, artists, playlists, videos
parameters.name: filter

get.description: Returns account information from YouTube Music.
